summary: gap-fix：清扫 residual registered 6 条（ISS-036~041）。W1 验证并关账已修的 COR-001/COR-002（readLedger full-file + partial-tail）；W2 实现 transcript_path 沙箱（SEC-001）并与 037 一并关账；W3 先收口 rank SSOT（039），再切片 scoring god-module（038），最后继续 fabric-hint 模块化（040）。不发 rc、不扩无关 backlog。
approach: 1) 036/037 已在 011/020 closeout 的 COR 修复中落地：本 plan 只做契约测试/smoke 锁定 + issue close evidence，禁止重写。2) 041 在 summarizeTranscript 入口加 known client transcript root allowlist + realpath 前缀 + size/suffix 限制，默认拒绝越界路径。3) 039 先于 038：删除 scoring 内重复 RankMode/RankOptions 与 cut 实现，cutRankedForRecall 改为 applyRankCapAndFloor 薄包装，类型只从 plan-context-rank 导出。4) 038 在 SSOT 稳定后抽 score-factors / rank-core / id-graph，buildScoringContext 保持装配，plan-context facade 公开 re-export 不变。5) 040 再抽 signal-decide / hint-config / session-signal-state / assistant-turn-emit，module.exports 表面稳定。

waves.name: architecture rank SSOT + scoring slice + fabric-hint modularization

design_decisions: 036/037: verify-not-rewrite — worktree 已有 full-file readLedger + parseJsonlEvents partial-tail drop；任务只补/确认契约测试与 close evidence，禁止再改行为路径

041 transcript sandbox: allowlist absolute realpath under known client transcript roots（Claude Code: ~/.claude/projects/**；Codex: ~/.codex/** 会话 transcript 根）；realpath prefix check；.jsonl suffix；size cap（建议 8MB 默认，超限返回 empty summary）；越界/相对路径/symlink escape → empty out，不 throw
039 rank SSOT: RankMode/RankOptions 只定义于 plan-context-rank.ts；scoring 与 plan-context facade re-export 之；cutRankedForRecall 必须调用 applyRankCapAndFloor，删除手写 topK+floor 副本
038 scoring slice: keep buildScoringContext as assembly orchestrator；抽出 score-factors / rank-core / id-graph（relatedLookupKeys）；plan-context.ts public re-export surface 不变
040 fabric-hint: module.exports 键集合保持稳定（main/decide/readLedger/summarizeTranscript/CONSTANTS/...）；新逻辑进 lib/*；测试可继续 require fabric-hint.cjs facade，低风险处可直测 lib
wave order hard: correctness → security → architecture；039 必须先于或与 038 同波次首任务，避免 038 继续复制 cut/types
若架构任务预算内无法完全关账：留下显式 residual gap + 当前 LOC/导出证据，禁止 false-close

patterns: SSOT types in leaf helper module, re-export from facade
conventions: no silent behavior change; tests encode contracts
Chinese issue notes OK; code identifiers English

constraints: preserve public exports and re-export surfaces
if architecture incomplete, leave residual open with explicit gap

definition_of_done: 6 issues 均有 close 或显式 residual gap 记录；036/037 契约测试+smoke 绿；041 sandbox 拒绝越界路径；039 无 dual Rank types/cut 实现；038 scoring 进一步切片且 facade re-export 不变；040 fabric-hint exports 稳定且相关 vitest 绿；server tsc --noEmit 绿。

prior_evidence.note: COR-001/COR-002 fixed; ARCH-002 skipped then; 036/037 are residual issue records of COR findings

confidence.evidence_source: inline plan-checker (planner agent terminated mid-flight after writing artifacts; local structural check)
warnings: workflow-planner agent terminated with API 403 after writing plan+tasks; artifacts validated locally
TASK-004/005 large architecture slices may leave residual if budget exceeded — tasks already encode no-false-close
TASK-002 depends on FABRIC_TRANSCRIPT_ROOTS test seam — implement carefully for existing tmp fixtures

boundary_grill.notes: No DEC conflicts with in_scope residual clearance; out_of_scope rc/release and full recall rewrite honored.
